title: carex gunniana
intro: Carex gunniana is a species of sedge, a type of grass-like plant native to the mountainous regions of Australia and New Zealand. It is also known as the 'Mountain Sedge'. The medicinal properties of Carex gunniana include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which are believed to offer health benefits including relief from respiratory problems and improved circulation.
